title: xiigen.i18n-translation.policy-check-inline.v1
description: Internal edge emitted when T666 TranslationResolverService calls T669 TranslationPolicyGate inline at pipeline Step 2. Captures the PERMITTED/DENIED verdict used to route between Step 3 (marketplace probe) and the policy-denied fallback path (CF-812).

tenantId.description: Tenant whose policy is being evaluated (ALS).

moduleId.description: Module slug the translation is requested for.

locale.description: BCP-47 locale being checked against i18n.enabledLocales and xiigen-translation-requests.

verdict.description: PERMITTED = locale in enabledLocales or translation-requests; DENIED triggers CF-812 fallback.
